data: Learn how to introduce yourself confidently in a new workplace

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to introduce yourself in a new workplace.

A confident introduction helps you make a great first impression at work.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/dade7b40-ed83-4c17-9dcd-8491788628e5-46.-Introducing-Oneself-at-Work.jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to introduce yourself at work, use this structure:

"My name is [name] and I have joined as [role]."

For example: "My name is Priya and I have joined as a marketing executive."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/dade7b40-ed83-4c17-9dcd-8491788628e5-46.-Introducing-Oneself-at-Work.jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If you are joining as a data analyst, you can say:

"My name is Rahul and I have joined as a data analyst."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/dade7b40-ed83-4c17-9dcd-8491788628e5-46.-Introducing-Oneself-at-Work.jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
This structure helps you introduce yourself clearly and professionally.

It tells people your name and the role you are starting in.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/dade7b40-ed83-4c17-9dcd-8491788628e5-46.-Introducing-Oneself-at-Work.jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice introducing yourself at work!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to introduce yourself on your first day

1.My name is Ananya and I have joined as a customer support associate.
2.Hi everyone, I am here and I am new to this team.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to introduce yourself to a colleague

1.You must have heard I was joining this company soon.
2.My name is Karthik and I have joined as a sales representative.

Correct answer: 2

My&&name&&is Vivek and&&I&&have&&joined as&&the operations manager.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?

'2. You have joined as a data analyst. How do you introduce yourself to a colleague?'

'3. You are a marketing executive on your first day. How do you introduce yourself?'

'4. You have joined as an HR executive. How do you introduce yourself to a senior employee?'

'5. You are a customer support associate. How do you introduce yourself to your new team?'"
